name: justpercent-foley-first-cut
description: JustPercent teaser — Foley-First Cut. HyperFrames composition, 1080x1920 (9:16), 38.5 s, 30 fps, muted. Every click/cut carries a visible foley signature: onomatopoeia chips, impact rings, camera shake, EQ spikes. UI recreated 1:1 from the app's own sources (en-US), light -> 3D flip -> dark.
